levels.title: Foundation
levels.subtitle: Deutsch von null
levels.description: Zero-base German with Spanish and French support: tiny grammar steps, speakable sentences, pronunciation-first practice, and immediate output.

levels.title: A1 Core
levels.subtitle: Solid beginner German
levels.description: A1 Core builds usable beginner German through sound, articles, present tense, word order, accusative, dative chunks, modal verbs, separable verbs, time expressions, and real situations.

levels.title: A2 Bridge
levels.subtitle: From A1 sentences to A2 answers
levels.description: A2 Bridge connects beginner German to practical A2 output through case control, spoken past, sentence brackets, subordinate clauses, descriptions, comparisons, real-life tasks, and short connected answers.

levels.title: A2 Core
levels.subtitle: Practical A2 German
levels.description: A2 Core builds stable practical German through case control, adjective endings, prepositions, past narration, connectors, reflexive verbs, advice, comparisons, real situations, and integrated output.

levels.title: B1 Bridge
levels.subtitle: From A2 tasks to B1 output
levels.description: B1 Bridge develops connected narration, justified opinions, practical updates, input-to-output work, grammar for clarity, conversational repair, and longer guided output.

levels.title: B1 Core
levels.subtitle: Stable B1 German
levels.description: B1 Core builds connected narration, nuanced opinions, practical work and life communication, native-style input routines, B1 grammar control, speaking repair, writing tasks, and integrated output.

levels.title: B2 Bridge
levels.subtitle: From strong B1 to B2 thinking
levels.description: B2 Bridge develops longer argument, nuanced stance, advanced connectors, native input processing, public topics, structured writing, presentations, and sustainable B2 routines.
